---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's currently inconvenient, confusing, or impossible?

## Proposed solution

A rough sketch of what the feature would look like, if you have one. Pseudocode is fine.

```python
# example of how the API might look
```

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why they don't fit.

## Scope check

ArchePy is a focused port of the MS-AA toolbox plus minimal fMRI conveniences. Features outside this scope (e.g., generic AA, single-subject methods) may be better placed in [`archetypes`](https://github.com/aleixalcacer/archetypes) or [`py_pcha`](https://github.com/ulfaslak/py_pcha). Does your request fit ArchePy's scope?

## Additional context

Anything else relevant — papers, related tools, prior conversations.
